plan.description: Plans implementation strategy before any code is written. Breaks tasks into steps, identifies affected files, and determines the right approach using AGENTS.md context.

build.description: Primary build agent. Orchestrates the plan→coder→reviewer cycle for all code changes.

clarify.description: Interviews a feature request to produce a detailed requirements specification. Identifies ambiguities, missing details, edge cases, and generates clarifying questions. Use ONLY as Phase 0 before any design or coding begins.

designer.description: Takes an approved requirements spec and produces a concrete design document with file-by-file changes, edit order, and risk assessment. Use ONLY after @clarify has produced a finalized spec.

design-reviewer.description: Reviews a design document from @designer. Checks for missed edge cases, codebase violations, state/persistence issues, and module dependency problems. Produces a verdict: approved, needs revision, or needs user input.

coder.description: Writes code following the plan. Uses Edit tool for targeted changes, never rewrites entire files. Runs check.sh after each batch of JS changes.

reviewer.description: Checks git diffs and runs verification after code changes. Reports every issue found and auto-fixes simple problems (syntax errors, import issues, lint violations).
